title: 286 Descendants Of Mir Jafar Delisted In WB SIR
description: The list of 286 names includes Syed Reja Ali Mirza (82), popularly called Chhote Nawab of the dynasty, his son Syed Fahim Mirza, a 16th generation descendant and also a Trinamul Congress councillor of ward no 10 under the Murshidabad Municipality, and his cousin sisters.
